headline: Costco (COST) Is Tackling Parking And Checkout Pain Points In Its Warehouses
summary: Costco Wholesale (NasdaqGS:COST) is rolling out new technology to speed up checkout and membership verification in its warehouses. The company is also expanding and relocating certain warehouses to relieve parking shortages and improve in-store traffic flow. These moves focus on practical upgrades to the on-site member experience, beyond previously discussed sales, valuation, or digital initiatives. Costco Wholesale operates a membership-based warehouse model that relies heavily on high...
